creator: cyen0312@gmail.com
text:
While installing devel/py-asn1-modules through portmaster, check for sha256 checksum shows a mismatch.

Shipped:
SHA256 (pyasn1-modules-0.0.5.tar.gz) = 47d196214aaf28f7fbae4716f57ddc9e8c81d47015e79dba83680f0f9fa19dc8

Correct:
SHA256 (pyasn1-modules-0.0.5.tar.gz) = be65f00ed28e30756f1ef39377cb382480a2368699179d646a84d79fe9349941

My portsnap source is portsnap.FreeBSD.org, and I have done portsnap fetch update. But the distinfo remained the same.

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/devel/py-asn1-modules
make makesum
How-To-Repeat: portmaster devel/py-asn1-modules
